step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling in the messy low bun, body proportions, butter-yellow off-shoulder waffle-knit pullover with cream linen drawstring shorts, and the entire minimalist kitchen scene including the white marble island, light wood stools, cream wall, ceramic plant pot, and matcha bowl with bamboo whisk — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her left hand at hip level resting against the counter edge: her left arm relaxed and slightly bent, wrist neutral, fingers curved around the box in a casual grip with thumb along the top edge, four fingers along the bottom edge, the box held flat horizontally with the front face angled three-quarters toward the camera to catch the side-light. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand and hip. Her body posture and arm angle may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her left hand visibly grips the product against the counter edge, her right hand continues holding the bamboo whisk poised over the matcha bowl. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the warm morning daylight should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white warm. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft morning daylight pouring through a window slightly out of frame on the left, with a gentle soft shadow falling toward the right across the marble countertop.
